title: The Blockchain Technical Stack
description: A layered diagram showing the core technical components that define a blockchain and their hierarchical relationship.
relationships: The P2P Network forms the base transport layer. Cryptographic Hashes and Digital Signatures secure the data. This secured data is structured into an Immutable Ledger of blocks. A Consensus Mechanism allows the distributed network to agree on the state of this ledger. A Native Digital Asset is often used to incentivize participation in the consensus process.
